epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Symptoms with microscopy/culture when needed; recurrent/complicated cases require confirmation and longer therapy

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High for uncomplicated cases; recurrent cases require structured management

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to microscopy/culture in many settings
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical azoles or oral fluconazole; longer suppressive therapy for recurrent VVC; evaluate diabetes and other drivers
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Antifungal resistance in some recurrent cases and self-treatment without confirmation
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong diagnostic access and guideline-driven management pathways
